message:
Apply Clippy lints across demo_showcase (round 2)

loading.rs:
- Make methods const: static_char, stop, is_running, tick, start
- Use let chains for cleaner tick ID check
- Collapse identical match arms (Dot | MiniDot | Points)
- Use map_or_else for overlay content building
- Fix pulse frame match (remove redundant cases)

sidebar.rs:
- Already committed strip_ansi changes (propagated from previous commit)

docs.rs:
- Make toggle_focus and exit_search const
- Collapse DocsFocus match arms (Content | Search => List)
- Use map_or for title extraction
- Simplify scroll info format string

jobs.rs:
- Clippy backtick escaping in doc comment

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
